forge.menu.updatescreen.title: Mod Update
forge.configgui.removeErroringEntities.t: Set dis 2 true 2 remoov any Entity dat throws an error in itz update method instead ov closin teh servr an reportin crash log. BE WARND DIS CUD SCREW UP EVRYTHIN USE SPARINGLY WE R NOT RESPONSIBLE 4 DAMAGEZ.
forge.configgui.removeErroringBlockEntit: Set dis 2 true 2 remoov any blockentity dat throws an error in itz update method instead ov closin teh servr an reportin crash log. BE WARND DIS CUD SCREW UP EVRYTHIN USE SPARINGLY WE R NOT RESPONSIBLE 4 DAMAGEZ.
forge.configgui.fullBoundingBoxLadders.t: Set dis 2 true 2 check teh entire entitys collishun boundin box 4 ladders instead ov jus teh block they r in. Causez noticeable differencez in mechanics so default iz vanilla behavior. Default: false.
forge.configgui.zombieBaseSummonChance.t: Base zombie summonin spawn chance. Allows changin teh bonus zombie summonin mechanic.
forge.configgui.zombieBabyChance.tooltip: Chance dat zombie (or subclas) iz baby. Allows changin teh zombie spawnin mechanic.
forge.configgui.logCascadingWorldGenerat: Log cascadin chunk generashun issuez durin terrain populashun.
forge.configgui.fixVanillaCascading.tool: Fix vanilla issuez dat cause worldgen cascadin. Dis DOEZ change vanilla worldgen so do not report bugs relatd 2 wurld differencez if dis flag iz on.
forge.configgui.dimensionUnloadQueueDela: Teh tiem in tickz teh servr will wait when dimenshun wuz queud 2 unload. Dis can be useful when rapidly loadin an unloadin dimenshuns, liek e.G. Throwin items thru nethr portal few tiem per second.
forge.configgui.clumpingThreshold.toolti: Controls teh numbr threshold at which Packet51 iz preferrd ovar Packet52, default an minimum 64, maximum 1024.
forge.configgui.treatEmptyTagsAsAir.tool: Vanilla will treat craftin recipez usin empty tags as air, an allow u 2 craft wif nothin in dat slot. Dis changez empty tags 2 use BARRIR as teh item. 2 prevent craftin wif air.
Skip checkin if an ingredient iz empty durin shapeles recipe deserializashun 2 prevent complex ingredients frum cachin tags 2 early.
forge.configgui.skipEmptyShapelessCheck: Skip checkin 4 empty ingredients in Shapeles Recipe Deserializashun
forge.configgui.forceSystemNanoTime.tool: Force teh use ov sistem.Nanotime instead ov glfwgettime as teh main client tiem providr.
forge.configgui.useItemWithDurationZero: Allow Use Item wif Durashun ov 0
Set dis 2 true 2 enable livin entitiez 2 use items wif durashuns ov 0. Fixez bean able 2 use eyez ov endr repeatedly by holdin down teh use butn. Disabld by default as it cud change interacshuns wif items ov existin modz.
forge.configgui.zoomInMissingModelTextIn: Toggle off 2 mak misin model text in da GUI fit inside teh slot.
Zoom in Misin model text in da GUI
forge.configgui.forgeCloudsEnabled.toolt: Enable uploadin cloud geometry 2 teh GPU 4 fastr renderin.
Disable cullin ov hidden facez next 2 stairs an slabs. Causez extra renderin, but cud fix sum resource packz dat exploit dis vanilla mechanic.
forge.configgui.alwaysSetupTerrainOffThr:
Enable Forge 2 kew all chunk updatez 2 teh Chunk Udate thread.
Cud increase FPS significantly, but cud also cause weird renderin lag.
Not recommendd 4 computers without significant numbr ov corez available.
forge.configgui.forgeLightPipelineEnable: Enable teh Forge block renderin pipeline - fixez teh lightin ov custom models.
forge.configgui.selectiveResourceReloadE: When enabld, makez specific reload taskz such as language changin quickr 2 run.
forge.configgui.showLoadWarnings.tooltip: When enabld, Forge will show any warnings dat occurrd durin loadin.
forge.configgui.allowMipmapLowering.tool: When enabld, Forge will allow mipmaps 2 be lowerd in real-tiem. Dis ar teh default behavior in vanilla. Use dis if u experience issuez wif resource packz dat use texturez lowr than 8x8.
forge.configgui.disableVersionCheck.tool: Set 2 true 2 disable Forge vershun check mechanics. Forge queriez small json file on r servr 4 vershun informashun. 4 moar details c teh ForgeVersion clas in r github.
forge.configgui.cachePackAccess.tooltip: Set dis 2 true 2 cache resource listings in resource an data packz
forge.configgui.indexVanillaPackCachesOn: Set dis 2 true 2 index vanilla resource an data packz on thread
Index vanilla resource packz on thread
forge.configgui.indexModPackCachesOnThre: Set dis 2 true 2 index mod resource an data packz on thread
Index mod resource packz on thread
forge.configgui.calculateAllNormals.tool: Durin block model bakin, manually calculatez teh normal 4 all facez. U will ned 2 reload ur resourcez 2 c results.
forge.configgui.stabilizeDirectionGetNea: When enabld, slightly biasd direcshun#getnearest calculashun will be usd 2 prevent normal fightin on 45 degree angle facez.
forge.froge.warningScreen.title: Forge snapshots notice
forge.froge.warningScreen.text: Froge iz not officially supportd. Bugs an instability r expectd.
forge.froge.supportWarning: WARNIN: Froge iz not supportd by Minecraft Forge
forge.experimentalsettings.tooltip: Dis wurld usez experimental settings, which cud stop werkin at any tiem.
forge.selectWorld.backupWarning.experime: Dis mesage will not show again 4 dis wurld.
